# wordpress_user (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `username` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `first_name` (String)
- `last_name` (String)
- `locale` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `nickname` (String)
- `reassign_to` (Number)
- `roles` (List of String)
- `slug` (String)
- `url` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `link` (String)
- `registered_date` (String)
